creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you please download the tarball directly from 
ftp://gcc.gnu.org/pub/gcc/snapshots/4.6-20120608/gcc-4.6-20120608.tar.bz2 
and see whether that matches?   

I tried to reproduce several times, and only the download from the 
mirror you have been using -- 
ftp://ftp-stud.fht-esslingen.de/pub/Mirrors/sources.redhat.com/gcc/snapshots/ 
-- causes this mismatch, not those I have been running or my direct 
downloads. 

(I have contacted the operators of that mirror.)
